headline: Exelon Promise Links Customer Relief To Long Term Earnings And Risk
summary: Exelon and its Maryland subsidiary BGE launched "The Exelon Promise," a customer focused program targeting rising energy costs. The initiative combines immediate bill relief measures with longer term efforts to address affordability and reliability across the system. The program is framed as a company wide response to growing energy demand and customer cost pressures. Exelon (NasdaqGS:EXC), recently trading at $49.02, is drawing fresh attention for how it is responding to customer...
